# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `BI-260007`
- Title: `Prevent scrollbar-induced page shift between routes`
- Requirement: [`FR-007`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260007.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Site visitor moving between top-level pages with different content lengths`
- Value statement: `For site visitors, keep the page frame stable to achieve a smoother and more polished navigation experience.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Changing between Home, Projects, and Contact does not cause a noticeable horizontal jump.`
  - `Scrollbar-space consistency is handled centrally in the shared layout.`
  - `The solution remains accessible and does not regress default scrolling behavior.`
  - `The change passes formatting, lint, and production build checks.`
- Dependencies: `FR-005 visual system baseline; FR-006 shared navigation behavior; QR-001 quality checks.`
- Validation approach: `Manual route switching check plus lint/format/build verification.`
- Priority score: `61`
- Target window: `Phase 2`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/REQ-FR-260007.md`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260007.md)
  - ADR: `adr/ADR-260005.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
